description: Finds qualified alternate suppliers that can supply a given component as a backup source, ranked by a fit score combining capacity and lead time (faster, higher-capacity alternates first). Only suppliers pre-qualified as alternates for the component (alternate_for) are returned. Used by the Resourcer to discover re-sourcing options. Inputs: component_id (the disrupted component), size (max alternates).

configuration.query:
FROM suppliers
| WHERE alternate_for == ?component_id
| EVAL cap_w = CASE(capacity == "high", 1.0, capacity == "medium", 0.7, 0.4), score = cap_w * (1.0 - (lead_time_days / 45.0)), lat = ST_Y(location), lon = ST_X(location)
| KEEP supplier_id, name, tier, lat, lon, country, region, components, alternate_for, certifications, lead_time_days, expedited_lead_time_days, capacity, profile_semantic, score
| SORT score DESC, lead_time_days ASC
| LIMIT ?size

component_id.description: The disrupted component id to find alternates for, e.g. 'cmp-emulsifier'.

size.description: Maximum number of alternate suppliers to return (e.g. 5).
